skills.name: Claymore
skills.description: Set up a trap in front of you that fires buckshot. It triggers by re-using the skill.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3
Targets: CaptionRatio

skills.name: Punji Stake
skills.description: Set up a spring trap that activates once enemies step on it. When the trap is activated, it launches the enemies far away toward Punji Stake. Increases Damage by 50% to medium-sized enemies and by 100% to large enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 5
Casting Time: 1.5 seconds
Duration: CaptionRatio2 seconds

skills.name: Detonate Traps
skills.description: Detonates part of your installed traps, dealing damage to enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Explosion Count: CaptionRatio

skills.name: Broom Trap
skills.description: Set up a rotating trap that inflicts damage to ground-type enemies within a radius.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x Number of Hits
Trap Duration: 15 seconds

skills.name: Spike Shooter
skills.description: Set up a trap in front of you that shoots arrows in regular intervals. As the skill level increases, the wire becomes longer and releases more arrows.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 1 second
Installation Length: CaptionRatio2
Trap Duration: 20 seconds

skills.name: Spring Trap
skills.description: Install a spring trap that shoots back whoever steps on it. Enemies caught in the trap become debuffed: they stop being shot back by the trap and do not receive damage.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Trap Duration: 25 seconds
Debuff Duration: 25 seconds

skills.name: Leghold Trap
skills.description: Throw a trap in front of you that prevents the enemy from moving. The enemy that stepped on the trap can not move.
skills.effect_text:
Trap Duration 20 seconds
Targets are unable to move for 5 seconds
Skill factor of toxic liquid per 1 second SkillFactor %
Number of toxic liquid target CaptionRatio
Toxic Liquid Duration: 10 seconds

attributes.name: Increased Maximum Weight
attributes.description: * Increases the character's maximum inventory weight by 20 per attribute level

attributes.name: Broom Trap: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Broom Trap] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Sapper: Subweapon Attack
attributes.description: * Sapper skills receive the attack values of your subweapon instead of the main weapon

attributes.name: Detonate Traps: Reset
attributes.description:
* Reduces the damage of [Detonate Traps] by 50%, but reduces the cooldown of Sapper skills by [traps detonated] x 2 seconds after the explosion

* Does not reduce the cooldown of [Detonate Traps]

attributes.name: Broom Trap: Decreased Movement Speed
attributes.description: * Reduces the movement speed of enemies affected by [Broom Trap] by 25% per debuff stack for 3 seconds

attributes.name: [Arts] Punji Stake: Instance
attributes.description:
* [Punji Stake] is now set up immediately, and decreases damage by 50%

Movement Speed is fixed to 10 for 5 seconds, increases the damage they take from the caster by 30% when attacked by Punji Stake
